title: Architecture Exploration
description: Explore RevDeck v0.1 architecture from RevDeck.txt and brainstorm artifacts. Map core modules, data model, storage, object graph, importer/analyzer boundaries, and integration points. Include recommended Rust crates if justified.

title: Implementation Exploration
description: Explore implementation approach for a fresh Rust TUI codebase. Identify project scaffold, CLI commands, Ratatui app structure, SQLite access patterns, binary parsing/indexing flow, command bar, and testing patterns.

title: UX And Product Exploration
description: Explore v0.1 product workflow, TUI layout, navigation model, Function Radar behavior, analysis memory, findings export, and acceptance criteria from an analyst perspective.

title: Risk And Test Exploration
description: Explore risk factors and test strategy. Cover binary fixture determinism, function-boundary accuracy, scoring explainability, migration safety, TUI state tests, command parser tests, and report round trips.
